envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Connector pack families bundle related vendor adapters into purchasable families per ADR-0083 Amendment 1 §9.4 + ADR-0084. Every family is governance-bound: entitlement enables availability; Foundation governance + map-region approval still authorize activation. Read-first by default; write actions disabled by default; risky writes dual-control. No secrets exposed. No connector payload leaks. All connector actions audited.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Connector pack families inform admin review + Dandelion recommendations. Entitlement makes a pack available. Foundation governance authorizes connector activation per ADR-0084. Per-connector RULE 21 research arc required before any real adapter implementation.
audit_expectations: INVOKE_CONNECTOR + ACTION_* preserved at future runtime

items.name: Collaboration Pack
items.description: Connector pack family for collaboration tools. Slack + Microsoft Teams + Gmail + Outlook + Google Calendar + Outlook Calendar.
items.human_readable_summary: Collaboration Pack. Slack + Teams + Gmail + Outlook + Calendars. Highest first-week aha-moment surface per Wave 6 matrix. Entitlement enables; governance authorizes.
items.model_usage_notes: Slack is the substrate-grounded first connector candidate per ADR-0084 (Wave 6 score 16.00). All activations require Foundation governance + map-region approval + per-connector RULE 21 research arc.
items.governance_notes: Entitlement makes the pack available. Dandelion may recommend. Admin may request activation. Foundation governance authorizes activation. Map-region approval required. Connector is read-first by default. Write actions disabled by default. Write actions approval-gated. Risky writes may require dual-control. No secrets exposed. No connector payload leaks. All connector actions audited.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: connector-pack.collaboration. Candidate for Team plan + included in Business + Enterprise. Final pricing product-team-decided.

items.human_readable_summary: People Pack. Workday + BambooHR + Rippling + Greenhouse + Lever + Lattice. HR / hiring / performance — HIGHEST sensitivity.
items.model_usage_notes: People connectors carry the most sensitive employee data. Never employee scoring. Never manager surveillance. Never psychological profiling. Never sensitive-attribute inference.

Connector is read-first by default. Write actions disabled by default. Write actions approval-gated. Risky writes may require dual-control. No secrets exposed. No connector payload leaks. items.description: Connector pack family for finance + expense + travel tools. SAP Concur + Ramp + Brex + Expensify + Navan/TripActions + TravelPerk + NetSuite + QuickBooks + Bill.com.

items.model_usage_notes: Finance connectors carry spend + commitment data. Writes may move money — risky writes mandatory dual-control per ADR-0026.
items.governance_notes: Entitlement makes the pack available. Dandelion may recommend. Admin may request activation. Foundation governance authorizes activation. Map-region approval required. Connector is read-first by default. Write actions disabled by default. Write actions approval-gated. Risky writes (payment, expense approval, vendor onboarding) require dual-control. No secrets exposed. No connector payload leaks. All connector actions audited.

items.name: Legal / Compliance Pack
items.description: Connector pack family for legal + compliance tools. DocuSign + Ironclad + Vanta + Drata + OneTrust.
items.human_readable_summary: Legal / Compliance Pack. DocuSign + Ironclad + Vanta + Drata + OneTrust. Contracts + compliance evidence intelligence.
items.model_usage_notes: Legal connectors carry contract + compliance evidence. Writes may have legal effect — risky writes mandatory dual-control per ADR-0026.
items.governance_notes: Entitlement makes the pack available. Dandelion may recommend. Admin may request activation. Foundation governance authorizes activation. Map-region approval required. Connector is read-first by default. Write actions disabled by default. Write actions approval-gated. Legal-effect writes require dual-control. Neutral compliance vocabulary required per ADR-0070. No claims of guaranteed compliance or regulator approval.
items.billing_notes: pack_id: connector-pack.legal-compliance. Included in Business + Enterprise. Final pricing product-team-decided.
